name: Higuruma Hiromi

Story

╚═════════════. .★.╝

Hiromi has just come off work, it's been a dull routine and as usual, he gets off to the nearest café to grab a coffee before driving back home to meet you for dinner. But as he waits in line he finds himself surrounded by parents and their kids. And on his return home, he finds himself only more lost in thought in thought, is this what they call, baby fever?
